### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto

User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1

X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED

X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.12
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Streaming: true
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Fs-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "netprof/parsers/pcap_reader.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Stream PCAP/PCAPNG and yield normalized TCP packet records.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import Iterator\r\n\r\nimport dpkt\r\n\r\nPacketRecord = tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _open_reader(path: Path) -> tuple[object, object]:\r\n    \"\"\"Open pcap or pcapng; fall back to pcap-only if UniversalReader fails. Returns (reader, file_handle).\"\"\"\r\n    f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n    try:\r\n        reader = dpkt.pcap.UniversalReader(f)\r\n        return reader, f\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        f.close()\r\n        f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n        try:\r\n            reader = dpkt.pcap.Reader(f)\r\n            return reader, f\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            f.close()\r\n            raise\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_packet(buf: bytes) -> PacketRecord | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload) for TCP. Return None if not TCP.\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        eth = dpkt.ethernet.Ethernet(buf)\r\n        if not isinstance(eth.data, dpkt.ip.IP):\r\n            return None\r\n        ip = eth.data\r\n        if not isinstance(ip.data, dpkt.tcp.TCP):\r\n            return None\r\n        tcp = ip.data\r\n        src_ip = socket_to_str(ip.src)\r\n        dst_ip = socket_to_str(ip.dst)\r\n        return (\r\n            0.0,  # ts filled by caller\r\n            src_ip,\r\n            dst_ip,\r\n            tcp.sport,\r\n            tcp.dport,\r\n            6,\r\n            bytes(tcp.data) if tcp.data else b\"\",\r\n        )\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef socket_to_str(s: bytes) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Convert dpkt IP bytes to dotted string.\"\"\"\r\n    if len(s) == 4:\r\n        return \".\".join(str(b) for b in s)\r\n    # IPv6\r\n    return str(s)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef read_pcap(path: Path, ts_offset: float = 0.0) -> Iterator[tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Stream packets from a single PCAP/PCAPNG file. Yields (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload).\"\"\"\r\n    reader = _open_reader(path)\r\n    try:\r\n        for ts, buf in reader:\r\n            rec = _parse_packet(buf)\r\n            if rec is None:\r\n                continue\r\n            t, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload = rec\r\n            yield (ts + ts_offset, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload)\r\n    finally:\r\n        reader.close()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef discover_capture_files(path: Path) -> list[Path]:\r\n    \"\"\"If path is a file, return [path]. If directory, return sorted .pcap and .pcapng paths.\"\"\"\r\n    if path.is_file():\r\n        return [path]\r\n    if not path.is_dir():\r\n        return []\r\n    files: list[Path] = []\r\n    for ext in (\"*.pcap\", \"*.pcapng\"):\r\n        files.extend(path.glob(ext))\r\n    return sorted(files)\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 2
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:01:20 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

```
{}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "netprof/parsers/pcap_reader.py", "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Stream PCAP/PCAPNG and yield normalized TCP packet records.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import Iterator\r\n\r\nimport dpkt\r\n\r\nPacketRecord = tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _open_reader(path: Path) -> tuple[object, object]:\r\n    \"\"\"Open pcap or pcapng; fall back to pcap-only if UniversalReader fails. Returns (reader, file_handle).\"\"\"\r\n    f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n    try:\r\n        reader = dpkt.pcap.UniversalReader(f)\r\n        return reader, f\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        f.close()\r\n        f = open(path, \"rb\")\r\n        try:\r\n            reader = dpkt.pcap.Reader(f)\r\n            return reader, f\r\n        except Exception:\r\n            f.close()\r\n            raise\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_packet(buf: bytes) -> PacketRecord | None:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload) for TCP. Return None if not TCP.\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        eth = dpkt.ethernet.Ethernet(buf)\r\n        if not isinstance(eth.data, dpkt.ip.IP):\r\n            return None\r\n        ip = eth.data\r\n        if not isinstance(ip.data, dpkt.tcp.TCP):\r\n            return None\r\n        tcp = ip.data\r\n        src_ip = socket_to_str(ip.src)\r\n        dst_ip = socket_to_str(ip.dst)\r\n        return (\r\n            0.0,  # ts filled by caller\r\n            src_ip,\r\n            dst_ip,\r\n            tcp.sport,\r\n            tcp.dport,\r\n            6,\r\n            bytes(tcp.data) if tcp.data else b\"\",\r\n        )\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        return None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef socket_to_str(s: bytes) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Convert dpkt IP bytes to dotted string.\"\"\"\r\n    if len(s) == 4:\r\n        return \".\".join(str(b) for b in s)\r\n    # IPv6\r\n    return str(s)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef read_pcap(path: Path, ts_offset: float = 0.0) -> Iterator[tuple[float, str, str, int, int, int, bytes]]:\r\n    \"\"\"Stream packets from a single PCAP/PCAPNG file. Yields (ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload).\"\"\"\r\n    reader = _open_reader(path)\r\n    try:\r\n        for ts, buf in reader:\r\n            rec = _parse_packet(buf)\r\n            if rec is None:\r\n                continue\r\n            t, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload = rec\r\n            yield (ts + ts_offset, src_ip, dst_ip, sport, dport, proto, payload)\r\n    finally:\r\n        reader.close()\r\n\r\n\r\ndef discover_capture_files(path: Path) -> list[Path]:\r\n    \"\"\"If path is a file, return [path]. If directory, return sorted .pcap and .pcapng paths.\"\"\"\r\n    if path.is_file():\r\n        return [path]\r\n    if not path.is_dir():\r\n        return []\r\n    files: list[Path] = []\r\n    for ext in (\"*.pcap\", \"*.pcapng\"):\r\n        files.extend(path.glob(ext))\r\n    return sorted(files)\r\n", "4:VARINT": 2}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
```
